name: New Hope Corporation Limited
analysis: NHC has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at A$5.6585. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$5.6585, stop A$5.2668, target A$6.0800. Risk/reward is 1.08:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
